AllocationFragmentationFieldMap.description: One row of the table mapping an allocation message to its fragmentation-related fields.

InfrastructureLayoutRow.description: One row of the layout table published in the Infrastructure Appendix for a message or component. Each row identifies either a FIX field (by tag number + name) or an embedded component (by name), records whether it is required, carries the Description-column text, and flags whether it appears as a nested child of a repeating-group counter.

infra_layout_description.description: Free-text content of the Description column of the row (may be empty).

infra_layout_element_name.description: Element name as printed in the Name column — either the FIX field name (e.g. ApplReqID) or the component name (e.g. StandardHeader, ApplIDRequestGrp).

infra_layout_field_tag.description: FIX tag number drawn from the Tag column when the row is a field (i.e. layout_kind = FIELD). Absent for COMPONENT rows.

infra_layout_kind.description: Row kind — either a FIX field (numeric Tag) or an embedded component (literal "Component" in the Tag column of the source table).

infra_layout_nested.description: Whether the row appears nested under a repeating-group counter (i.e. its Tag column is prefixed with the "→" arrow in the source table).

infra_layout_required.description: Whether the field or component is required, as printed in the Req’d column of the source layout table ("Y" / "N").

InfrastructureLayoutRow.title: InfrastructureLayoutRow

InfrastructureLayoutRowKindEnum.description: Discriminator for a row in an Infrastructure message- or component-layout table: either a FIX field (numeric Tag column) or an embedded component (literal "Component" in the Tag column).

ProductCoverage.description: Product/asset classes covered by FIX at the application layer.
ProductCoverage.title: ProductCoverage

QuoteModelEnum.description: Quoting business models referenced in the Quotation / Negotiation category.
QuoteModelEnum.title: QuoteModelEnum

RegistrationStatusDescription.description: One row of the RegistStatus(506) value/description table.

status_code.description: Wire status code as referenced in the chapter.

status_label.description: Human-readable label of the status code.

RegistrationStatusDescription.title: RegistrationStatusDescription

SessionProtocolName.description: Named session-layer protocols in the FIX Family of Standards.
SessionProtocolName.title: SessionProtocolName

SpecificComponent.description: A component used only by messages within a single category.

business_area.description: Business area the element belongs to.

fields.description: Fields directly contained by the enclosing element.

is_repeating_group.description: True when the component is a repeating group.

SpecificComponent.title: SpecificComponent

StandardEncodingName.description: Named encodings of the FIX Family of Standards.
StandardEncodingName.title: StandardEncodingName

StandardLayer.description: Layer of the FIX Technical Standard Stack.
StandardLayer.title: StandardLayer

StandardResponseDirectionEnum.description: Direction of a "Standard Response" mapping — which area the requesting message belongs to.
StandardResponseDirectionEnum.title: StandardResponseDirectionEnum

StandardResponseMapping.description: One row of a "Standard Responses for <area> Messages" table mapping a request message to its appropriate response(s).

appropriate_responses.description: Free-text appropriate-response cell from the Standard Responses tables.

category_label.description: Category label as printed in the source table (free text; may include parenthesised sub-categories such as "Single General Order Handling").

fix_message.description: FIX message name with MsgType in parentheses, e.g. AllocationInstruction(35=J).

StandardResponseMapping.title: StandardResponseMapping

TenorUnit.description: Time unit used in a FIX Tenor expression.
TenorUnit.title: TenorUnit

TimePrecision.description: Time-unit precision for FIX time-bearing datatypes.
TimePrecision.title: TimePrecision

TradeAppendix.description: Tree-root container for the Trade Appendix — the spec companion document that publishes the full message- and component-layout tables for every message and component used in the Trade business area, organized into one "Appendix – <X> Category" sub-section per Trade category plus a final "Appendix – Common Category" sub-section covering the layouts of the chapter's common components.

description.description: Optional preface prose for the Trade Appendix as a whole.

published_version.description: Version stamp from the document header.

publisher.description: Publishing body of the FIX Latest specification.

trade_appendix_sections.description: Per-category sub-sections of the Trade Appendix — one "Appendix – <X> Category" section per Trade category, plus a synthetic "Common Category" section that lists layouts of the chapter's common components.

TradeAppendix.title: TradeAppendix

TradeAppendixSection.description: One "Appendix – <X> Category" sub-section of the Trade Appendix. Bundles the per-message layout tables (TradeMessageDetail) and per-component layout tables (TradeComponentDetail) for messages and components that belong to one Trade category — or, for the synthetic "Common" section, the layouts of the chapter's common components.

components.description: Layout tables for the components that belong to the appendix section.

messages.description: Layout tables for the messages that belong to the appendix section. Empty for the "Common" section.

title.description: Section heading exactly as printed in the Trade Appendix (e.g. "Appendix – CrossOrders Category").

trade_appendix_category.description: Identifier for an appendix section — either the Trade category name as printed in the heading (e.g. "CrossOrders", "MultilegOrders", "OrderMassHandling", "ProgramTrading", "SingleGeneralOrderHandling") or the literal "Common" for the common-components appendix.

TradeAppendixSection.title: TradeAppendixSection

TradeBusinessArea.description: Tree-root container for the Trade (Orders and Executions) business area of FIX Latest.

published_version.description: Version stamp from the document header.

publisher.description: Publishing body of the FIX Latest specification.

referenced_global_components.description: Names of Global Components from the FIX Latest "Global Components" page that are referenced by messages in the containing business area. References instances of the :class:`GlobalComponent` class (declared in fix_base) by name.

trade_area.description: Identity of the business area the chapter describes.

trade_common_component_details.description: Per-common-component descriptions from the chapter's final section.

trade_common_components.description: Common Components declared at the bottom of the chapter.

trade_components_overview_note.description: Intro prose of the area-wide Components sub-section.

trade_diagram_conventions.description: Sentence describing diagram conventions used in the chapter.

trade_footnotes.description: Footnotes attached to the area-wide components table.

trade_message_diagram_template_url.description: URL of the "Message Diagram Templates" page referenced by the chapter introduction.

trade_messages_overview_note.description: Intro prose of the area-wide Messages sub-section.

TradeBusinessArea.title: TradeBusinessArea

TradeCaptureReportDirectionEnum.description: Direction of a TradeCaptureReport relative to the marketplace.
TradeCaptureReportDirectionEnum.title: TradeCaptureReportDirectionEnum

TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRoleEnum.description: Roles played by trade-capture-report identifier fields.
TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRoleEnum.title: TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRoleEnum

TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRule.description: A rule governing one of the TradeCaptureReport(35=AE) identifier fields.

identifier_role.description: Role of the trade-capture-report identifier field.

TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRule.title: TradeCaptureReportIdentifierRule

TradeCaptureReportUsage.description: One documented usage of the TradeCaptureReport(35=AE) message.

identifier_role.description: Role of the trade-capture-report identifier field.

TradeCaptureReportUsage.title: TradeCaptureReportUsage

TradeCaptureReportUsageEnum.description: Documented usages of the TradeCaptureReport(35=AE) message.
TradeCaptureReportUsageEnum.title: TradeCaptureReportUsageEnum

TradeCategoryEnum.description: The five message categories of the FIX Latest Trade (Orders and Executions) business area. Subset of MessageCategoryEnum.
TradeCategoryEnum.title: TradeCategoryEnum

TradeCategorySection.description: A per-category sub-section of the Trade chapter.

trade_category_background.description: Optional "Background" prose preceding a category's message descriptions (e.g. the Cross Order Handling chapter's cross-trade overview).

trade_category_components_note.description: Intro prose of a category's Components sub-section.

trade_category_specific_components.description: Components used exclusively by messages within a single category.

trade_fragmentation_entries.description: Rows of the fragmentation table listed in a Trade category that documents which messages may be fragmented and which repeating group is fragmentable (currently published only for List/Program/Basket Trading).

trade_message_groups.description: Purpose-grouped message descriptions inside a category.

TradeCategorySection.title: TradeCategorySection

TradeCommonComponentDetail.description: Per-common-component description from the chapter's final "Common Components" section.

description.description: Description of the common component's purpose.

trade_layout_rows.description: Ordered rows of the layout table published for the message or component in the Trade Appendix.

trade_layout_url.description: URL of the detailed message- or component-layout in the Trade Appendix.

TradeCommonComponentDetail.title: TradeCommonComponentDetail

TradeCommonComponentName.description: Names of the Common Components declared at the bottom of the Trade business-area chapter — components used by messages across more than one Trade category.
TradeCommonComponentName.title: TradeCommonComponentName

trade_layout_rows.description: Ordered rows of the layout table published for the message or component in the Trade Appendix.

trade_layout_url.description: URL of the detailed message- or component-layout in the Trade Appendix.

TradeComponentEntry.description: One row of the area-wide trade components table.

category.description: Category the component is listed under. Common Components are listed under the synthetic "Common Components" value.

trade_footnote_number.description: Footnote indicator on a component-table row.

trade_is_common.description: True when the component is declared as a Common Component.

TradeComponentEntry.title: TradeComponentEntry

TradeComponentRepetition.description: Whether a FIX component is repeating or non-repeating.
TradeComponentRepetition.title: TradeComponentRepetition

TradeComponentTableFootnote.description: A footnote on the area-wide components table.

trade_footnote_number.description: Footnote indicator on a component-table row.

trade_introduced_in.description: FIX version or Extension Pack that introduced the component.

trade_sole_category.description: Single category that actually uses the component.

TradeComponentTableFootnote.title: TradeComponentTableFootnote

TradeFragmentationEntry.description: One row of a fragmentation table published in a Trade category (currently only List/Program/Basket Trading) identifying a message that may be fragmented, the "Total Entries" field used to indicate the total count across all fragments of the batch, and the verbatim description of the repeating group that may be fragmented.

trade_fragmentation_message.description: Message that may be fragmented — verbatim text from the Message column of the fragmentation table (e.g. "NewOrderList(35=E)").

trade_fragmentation_repeating_group.description: Verbatim description of the repeating group that may be fragmented — from the table's third column.

trade_fragmentation_total_entries_field.description: Name and tag of the "Total Entries" field used to indicate the total count across all fragments of the batch (e.g. "TotNoOrders(68)").

TradeFragmentationEntry.title: TradeFragmentationEntry

TradeLayoutRow.description: One row of the layout table published in the Trade Appendix for a message or component. Each row identifies either a FIX field (by tag number + name) or an embedded component (by name), records whether it is required, carries the Description-column text, and flags whether it appears as a nested child of a repeating-group counter.

trade_layout_description.description: Free-text content of the Description column of the row (may be empty).

trade_layout_element_name.description: Element name as printed in the Name column — either the FIX field name or the component name.

trade_layout_field_tag.description: FIX tag number drawn from the Tag column when the row is a field (i.e. layout_kind = FIELD). Absent for COMPONENT rows.

trade_layout_kind.description: Row kind — either a FIX field (numeric Tag) or an embedded component (literal "Component" in the Tag column of the source table).

trade_layout_nested.description: Whether the row appears nested under a repeating-group counter (i.e. its Tag column is prefixed with the "→" arrow in the source table).

trade_layout_required.description: Whether the field or component is required, as printed in the Req'd column of the source layout table ("Y" / "N").

TradeLayoutRow.title: TradeLayoutRow

TradeLayoutRowKindEnum.description: Discriminator for a row in a Trade message- or component-layout table: either a FIX field (numeric Tag column) or an embedded component (literal "Component" in the Tag column).
TradeLayoutRowKindEnum.title: TradeLayoutRowKindEnum

description.description: Description of the message's purpose and usage.

msg_type.description: MsgType(35) wire value identifying the message.

trade_layout_rows.description: Ordered rows of the layout table published for the message or component in the Trade Appendix.

trade_layout_url.description: URL of the detailed message- or component-layout in the Trade Appendix.

TradeMessageEntry.description: One row of the area-wide trade messages table.

msg_type.description: MsgType(35) wire value identifying the message.

TradeMessageEntry.title: TradeMessageEntry

TradeMessageGroup.description: Purpose-grouped sub-section inside a category's Messages sub-section (e.g. "New Order Single", "Execution Reports", "Order Cancel Requests" under Single/General Order Handling).

description.description: Description of the purpose-group's role within the category.

messages.description: Messages bundled under the purpose-group heading.

trade_group_title.description: Purpose-group heading inside a category's Messages sub-section.

trade_ord_status_precedence_entries.description: Rows of the OrdStatus(39) precedence table that appears inside the Execution Reports purpose-group of the Single/General Order Handling category.

TradeMessageGroup.title: TradeMessageGroup

TradeOrdStatusPrecedenceEntry.description: One row of the OrdStatus(39) precedence table published in the Execution Reports purpose-group of the Single/General Order Handling category. Defines the precedence ranking used to resolve simultaneous state transitions on an order, paired with the human-readable OrdStatus label and its descriptive prose.

description.description: Verbatim OrdStatus description from the table.

trade_ord_status_label.description: Human-readable OrdStatus(39) label as printed in the Execution Reports precedence table (e.g. "Pending Cancel", "Done for Day", "Filled").

trade_ord_status_precedence.description: Precedence rank (1 = lowest, higher numbers take precedence) of an OrdStatus(39) value used to resolve simultaneous state transitions on an order.

TradeOrdStatusPrecedenceEntry.title: TradeOrdStatusPrecedenceEntry

UDFTagRange.description: A reserved range of tag numbers for User Defined Fields.

description.description: Notes on the range's intended use.

high_tag.description: Upper bound of the tag range. Required for all ``usage`` values except ``GTC_RESERVED`` (which is open-ended, 50000+). Downstream validators should enforce this; the constraint cannot be expressed here because LinkML's ``equals_string`` operator only accepts string-ranged slots and ``usage`` is an enum.

low_tag.description: Inclusive lower bound of the range.

requires_registration.description: True when tags in the range must be registered.

usage.description: Usage policy assigned to the range.

UDFTagRange.title: UDFTagRange

UDFTagRangeUsage.description: Usage policy assigned to a reserved range of UDF tag numbers.
UDFTagRangeUsage.title: UDFTagRangeUsage

description: Container for the structural elements of the FIX Latest Introduction section. Tree root for instance data.

business_areas.description: Top-level business areas of FIX Latest.

datatypes.description: FIX Protocol datatype definitions and value spaces.

global_components.description: Global Components defined in the Introduction.

preface.description: The Preface text of the specification.

product_coverage.description: Product/asset classes covered by FIX at the application layer.

published_version.description: Version stamp from the document header.

publisher.description: Publishing body of the FIX Latest specification.

udf_ranges.description: Reserved ranges of user-defined-field tag numbers.

utc_leap_seconds_note.description: Prose note on UTC leap-second handling for UTCTimestamp.

title: fix-protocol
